description: Allow mapping d-pad directions (up/down/left/right) to actions, not just cursor movement. Each d-pad direction becomes a mappable button like the face buttons. When a d-pad direction is mapped to an action, it fires that action instead of moving the cursor. Unmapped directions retain cursor movement behavior. This requires detecting d-pad as discrete button presses (threshold on axis values) rather than just analog values.
title: D-pad button mapping
